title: Make active task continuity discoverable without turning observations into commitments
sources: human mandate, 2026-07-19: trial the proposed continuity trigger

mainline.contradiction: The project has a validated Mission Record state machine, but ordinary agents neither enumerate active missions nor reliably decide at continuity safe points which unresolved obligations deserve durable task state.
acceptance: A project-level command lists every active Mission from its authoritative records and fails closed on invalid records.
Always-loaded agent guidance records only authorized obligations that cross a safe point and have a return condition, while leaving local steps and unapproved ideas outside task state.
A real agent can answer which missions are active from the ordinary entry path, and a nearby low-consequence idea does not create a Mission.
